## Checklist

- [ ] I branched off `main` and did NOT commit directly to `main`
- [ ] This PR does one thing (one feature / one fix)
- [ ] TypeScript only — no plain `.js` files
- [ ] No secrets or credentials are committed (checked `.env.local` is not staged)
- [ ] No analytics, tracking, or user-account code added
- [ ] If I added an API route, it uses the `checkRateLimit` helper
- [ ] I only touched files related to my feature
